channel.title: Problem-Solving Notes on MIT OpenCourseWare
channel.description: Recent content in Problem-Solving Notes on MIT OpenCourseWare

item.title: rec1.pdf
item.description: Administrative items; Quick Review of Basic Accounting Concepts; Problem Set # 1: New England Bicycle Security Co.

item.title: rec10.pdf
item.description: Review of Shareholders? Equity, Review of the three accounting methods for investing in the stock of other companies, Overview Purchase Method and Sample Problems.

item.title: rec11final_review.pdf
item.description: Revenue Recognition, Accounts Receivable, Inventory (LIFO vs. FIFO), PP&E, Statement of Cash Flows After midterm, Accounting for taxes, Marketable securities, Long-term bonds and leases, Investments and consolidations.

item.title: rec2.pdf
item.description: Principles of financial accounting measurement: Quick Review; Problems and Questions.

item.title: rec3.pdf
item.description: Review of Revenue Recognition, A/R Concepts and Inventory.

item.title: rec4.pdf
item.description: Overview of Accounting for Long Lived Assets.

item.title: rec5.pdf
item.description: SCF Checklist, SCF Examples and Other Business.

item.title: rec5midterm_review.pdf
item.description: Review of Key Concepts, Problems, Checklist and Famous Last Words for Midterm.

item.title: rec7.pdf
item.description: Questions on previous assignment, Marketable Securities, Long-Term Debt (Bonds), Terminology, Balance Sheet Equation Effects, Sample Problems.

item.title: rec9.pdf
item.description: Terminology, Criteria for Lease Capitalization, Balance Sheet Equation Effects.
